steps.title: Calculate accounts registered in the first 5 days
steps.content:
At 900 accounts per day, the number registered over 5 days is:
$$900 \times 5 = 4,500$$

steps.title: Find the fraction of the first 45,000 accounts
steps.content:
The fraction of the first 45,000 accounts registered in the first 5 days is:
$$\frac{4,500}{45,000} = \frac{45}{450} = \frac{1}{10}$$
B is correct.
